scope.summary: Finish cloud encrypted message and file storage against Postgres plus S3-compatible object storage, including upload/download proof from two registered devices.
goals: Persist encrypted message bodies and file metadata
Store encrypted file blobs in S3-compatible object storage
Reject file blob uploads whose plaintext size/hash does not match initialized metadata
Hydrate the same conversations/messages/files on a second device
Prove revoked devices cannot fetch message/file APIs

acceptance.description: Device A uploads a file and sends metadata; an upload whose plaintext size/hash does not match metadata is rejected; device B downloads/decrypts the valid file after recovery-key unlock; revoked device access is rejected.

verification.manual: Attach non-secret API/browser evidence with file ids, object keys, hashes, integrity rejection, and ciphertext plaintext-leak scan.
